user.title: Voltiq Energy Manager
user.description: Choose your electricity retailer and optionally connect to your Voltiq backend for device control.

data.backend_url: Voltiq backend URL (optional, for device control)

supabase.title: Voltiq Cloud (optional)
supabase.description: Connect to your Voltiq Supabase database to enable earnings tracking, alerts, and settings sync. Skip if you only need energy prices and solar forecast.

location.title: Solar Forecast
location.description: Used for solar generation forecasting via Open-Meteo (free, no API key needed).

sensors.title: Power Sensors (optional)
sensors.description: Map your existing Home Assistant power sensors to Voltiq. Leave blank to use Voltiq's built-in sensors from your backend.

data.entity_solar_power: Solar PV power sensor (W or kW)
data.entity_load_power: Home load / consumption sensor (W or kW)

energy.title: Energy & Price Sensors (optional)
energy.description: Map cumulative energy meters and price sensors. These enable the Energy view and long-term statistics. Leave blank if not available.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach backend -- check the URL and try again.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed -- check your API key.

sensors.title: Power Sensors
sensors.description: Map your inverter, battery, and grid sensors. These are used on the Voltiq dashboard and for power flow display. Leave blank to use Voltiq's built-in sensors.

data.entity_solar_power: Solar PV power sensor (W or kW)

energy.title: Energy & Price Sensors
energy.description: Map cumulative energy sensors for the Energy view and long-term statistics. Also map price sensors if you use a separate energy provider integration.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Voltiq can create a dedicated sidebar dashboard that displays all your energy data in one place.
